stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The annex shows the formula for calculating the Dry Operating Index (DOI) and any necessary Index corrections for an MRJT aeroplane. Using the following information, determine the correct DOI for the flight when one additional cabin crew is positioned at the AFT cabin door.

Dry Operating Mass (DOM): 35 325 kg
Lcg (balance arm of the initial DOM): 658 in
